# Why This Tweet Underperformed

The tweet's low engagement stems from a **niche product announcement lacking emotional urgency or novelty**—while it provides specific metrics (65% APY) and clear utility, it reads as a standard platform promotion rather than a compelling narrative, and the target audience (Solana DeFi yield farmers) is relatively small compared to broader crypto Twitter.
